item.title: remembering Khaled Nabhan
item.description: Source: https://youtu.be/p05a2lIe3q8 Sheikh Khaled Nabhan was killed on Monday by an Israeli tank shell during a bombardment of the refugee camp in Nuseirat in the center of Gaza. His daughter and nephew announced this on social media, and Al-Adwan Hospital confirmed his death. Nabhan became known through a video on social media: He holds his lifeless granddaughter Reem in his arms, kisses her forehead goodbye and calls the three-year-old "soul of my soul". The phrase became a symbol of the pain experienced by Palestinians as a result of the Israeli bombings in the Middle East war.
item.dc:creator: IslamExplained

item.title: The 494th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
AAAAAwwwwWWWOOOOOOOOoooooo is a pretty cool name, not gonna lie.
UNFUN FACT: People are fucking stupid
I'm actually allergic to some of the preservatives in hot dogs.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
Got 'em
@SeveralRaccoonsInAHumanSuit
Night Time is Best Time
Me
That doesn't at all sound fun in any way.
How dare a BBQ place not have vegan options!
FUN FACT: F O R G
I'm sure this is a reference to an interview with her, but I don't care enough to look it up.
Corp Bussy Stems
root beer flavored vape juice flavored root ber
@IAmTheComet always bringing us those mentally healthy memes
Also: Narrating, Neverending, Neatening, Noting, Nutmeg, Nutting, Nottinghamg, Numbering...
The text is just shit on this one how did they fuck it up this bad?
Another great school name would be "School".
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Stuff my husband sends me
item.description:
Not a lesbian, but in this house, we listen and we don't judge.
Dude is a great feminist ally!
Dreams. Goals.
Adulting gets zero stars.
Life imitating art. This is our 16 year old at the Video Game History Museum
Getting this for our new house!
Creating a TED Talk about the perils of not teaching social studies with fidelity anymore. This bolsters my argument!
He was schooling our 19 year old on "Good music"
Correlation does not equal causation.
Because I have ADHD
Thanks 2024!!
item.dc:creator: LadyMacDeath

item.title: Life has been rough lately. (VENT)
item.description: Hi, imgur. I was debating on whether or not I should post this. I usually just lurk around here and haven't posted in a while. But I kind of needed to vent a bit, and instead of bothering my family and friends with my problems, I'm going to vent here a bit, comfortable in the knowledge that this will just die in usersub. I lost my job last month. It was a decently paying job in retail management, which I have 14 years of experience in. I had worked for the company in previous years, left for a while, and then returned to the company. I miss it, but it wasn't meant to be, I suppose. I've applied for unemployment as soon as I could, and my application is still processing. I've applied to almost every single retail management position I can find and have had several interviews with varying companies, but I keep getting passed over. I don't understand why my experience isn't good enough for jobs that are paying much less than what I was earning before. It's incredibly disheartening. My bank account is severely overdrawn, I can't afford to pay my bills, and I'm terrified that my car is going to get repossessed because I can't afford the monthly payments on my loan anymore. I can't afford any of the prescription medication I need either. My only saving grace is that my roommates are able to shoulder my portion of rent for now. I'm falling back into depression and I'm ashamed to ask my family for help because I feel like I'm always asking them for help. I feel like a failure, and it's absolutely awful. I am dying to go back to work. I hate sitting around the house doing nothing. I just don't understand why I'm not able to find somewhere that will hire me. I guess that's it. If you made it this far and read through my rant, thank you for providing a listening ear. I hope everyone has a fantastic holiday, whatever you celebrate, and a wonderful New Year. TLDR; I lost my job and feel like a failure. _________________ EDIT: A few people commented suggesting I post a link to my etsy or paypal. If you'd like to buy something from my etsy, feel free, but please don't feel obligated. The link is here: https://www.etsy.com/shop/InkyPawWorkshop My Paypal is here, but PLEASE don't feel like you have to donate at all. That wasn't the point of my posting this. I truly did just want to vent my frustrations. https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/sarahsan16
item.dc:creator: SarahSan16
